title: 3-Ingredient Peanut Butter Cookies
excerpt: Who doesn't love a peanut butter cookie? If it has 3 ingredients and bakes in under 10 minutes, it has to be a winner! This recipe has been around for ages and I've tried and tested it. Ingredients 1 cup sugar (250ml) 1 cup peanut butter (250 ml) 1 egg Method …
html:
Who doesn't love a peanut butter cookie? If it has 3 ingredients and bakes in under 10 minutes, it has to be a winner!

This recipe has been around for ages and I've tried and tested it.

Ingredients

  • 1 cup sugar (250ml)
  • 1 cup peanut butter (250 ml)
  • 1 egg

Method

Set the oven to 180C

  1. Mix all 3 ingredients with an electric mixer.
  2. Make equal-sized balls and place them on a baking tray lined with baking paper. Spray and Cook the baking paper.
  3. Press the cookies down slightly flat with the back of a fork.
  4. Bake for 10 minutes. Keep an eye on them so they don't get too brown.

Tips

  • Leave the cookies on the baking tray to cool. They'll still feel soft when they've just finished baking, but will turn nice and firm and crisp once cooled.
  • You can add choc chips and finely chopped nuts for a lovely twist.
  • To get all the cookies the same size, use a small ice cream scoop or one of your measuring spoons.
